title: Waifu Story
description: Turn your solitary adventures into a shared journey! Waifu Story introduces loyal companions to help you survive and thrive.
body:
# Waifu Story

Is a dynamic,company and combat mod that brings persistent companionship and support to your Minecraft world. It introduces unique, friendly entities ("Waifus") that can be recruited and managed to accompany you throughout your game.

These companions are more than just decorative additions; they are active, intelligent, and persistent allies designed to enhance your gameplay experience.

![Rem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3ae1cf7553f8ef69d7d9a4f6c19ffaef8869466.png)

# ✨ Key Features

Active Combat Companionship: Your Waifus will actively protect you and fight alongside you, providing essential damage output and diverting enemy attention.

Item Management & Usage: They are intelligent and capable! Your companions accept and utilize food, potions, and weapons to sustain themselves and boost their performance on the battlefield.

Smart Command System:

Use Shift + Right-Click on your companion to easily switch between two modes:

Follow: She follows you and actively fights.

Wait: She holds her position until commanded otherwise.

Rest and Sleep Behavior: When it gets late in the game, your companions will automatically seek out and sleep near a bed, adding a layer of realism and personality to their existence.

Persistent Presence: Companions are permanent additions to your world and will only leave your side if they are defeated (killed) in combat.
